title: ComPWA policy configuration
description: Configuration for the tool.compwa.policy TOML table.

dev-python-version.description: Python version used for the development environment.
dev-python-version.title: Dev Python Version

package-manager.description: Package or environment manager used by the repository.
package-manager.title: Package Manager

repo-name.description: Repository name, usually as it appears in its hosting URL.
repo-name.title: Repo Name

repo-organization.description: Organization under which the repository is hosted.
repo-organization.title: Repo Organization

repo-title.description: Human-readable repository title; defaults to the repository name when empty.
repo-title.title: Repo Title

no-ruff.description: Do not enforce Ruff as a linter.
no-ruff.title: No Ruff

pytest-single-threaded.description: Run pytest without the parallel ``-n`` argument.
pytest-single-threaded.title: Pytest Single Threaded

doc-apt-packages.description: APT packages required to build the documentation.
doc-apt-packages.title: Doc Apt Packages

excluded-python-versions.description: Python versions that the project does not support.
excluded-python-versions.title: Excluded Python Versions

imports-on-top.description: Move notebook imports to the top of the notebook.
imports-on-top.title: Imports On Top

branch-coverage.description: Enable branch coverage in the Coverage.py pytest configuration.
branch-coverage.title: Branch Coverage

type-checker.description: Type checkers used by the project.
type-checker.title: Type Checker

allow-vscode-coverage-gutters.description: Keep and recommend the VS Code Coverage Gutters extension.
allow-vscode-coverage-gutters.title: Allow Vscode Coverage Gutters

allow-labels.description: Do not enforce the shared ``labels.toml`` configuration.
allow-labels.title: Allow Labels

no-github-actions.description: Do not add the standard ComPWA GitHub Actions workflows.
no-github-actions.title: No Github Actions

github-pages.description: Publish the documentation through GitHub Pages.
github-pages.title: Github Pages

keep-pr-linting.description: Do not overwrite the pull-request linting workflow.
keep-pr-linting.title: Keep Pr Linting

macos-python-version.description: Python version for the macOS test job; use ``disable`` to omit the job.
macos-python-version.title: Macos Python Version

no-milestones.description: Do not add workflows that manage GitHub milestones.
no-milestones.title: No Milestones

no-pypi.description: Do not publish the package to PyPI.
no-pypi.title: No Pypi

no-version-branches.description: Do not update major and minor version branches when tagging a release.
no-version-branches.title: No Version Branches

ci-skipped-tests.description: Python versions for which the CI test job is skipped.
ci-skipped-tests.title: Ci Skipped Tests

keep-workflow.description: GitHub Actions workflow files that policy must not update or remove.
keep-workflow.title: Keep Workflow

upgrade-frequency.description: Frequency of the workflow that upgrades lock and constraint files.
upgrade-frequency.title: Upgrade Frequency

no-binder.description: Do not update the Binder configuration.
no-binder.title: No Binder

allowed-cell-metadata.description: Metadata keys allowed in Jupyter notebook cells.
allowed-cell-metadata.title: Allowed Cell Metadata

no-cspell-update.description: Do not enforce the shared cSpell configuration.
no-cspell-update.title: No Cspell Update

tombi-errors-on-warnings.description: Make the Tombi lint hook fail when it emits warnings.
tombi-errors-on-warnings.title: Tombi Errors On Warnings

toml-formatter.description: TOML formatter configured for the repository.
toml-formatter.title: Toml Formatter

gitpod.description: Create and maintain a Gitpod configuration file.
gitpod.title: Gitpod

keep-issue-templates.description: Do not remove the GitHub issue-template directory.
keep-issue-templates.title: Keep Issue Templates
